failures.description: The agent made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation by passing product_id as integer 0 and omitting the required item_id, despite having the correct string IDs available.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to check whether item_id 1096508426 for product_id 1808611083 has difficulty level beginner. The required IDs and required tool schema were already available before the Researcher acted. At index 2, the Researcher produced tool_args {"product_id": 0}, which both changed the product_id to an unsupported integer value and omitted required item_id. The next step confirms the malformed invocation with a SchemaError: the tool requires string product_id and item_id. This failure was not resolved later; the agent stopped with an error-based answer.
